fields.title: Add pre-commit hook for critical tests
fields.prompt_text: We should have a pre commit hook that runs critical tests
fields.initial_plan: 1) Inspect existing pre-commit hook structure and current hook scripts. 2) Add a new git hook script that executes the critical test marker set. 3) Register the new hook in .pre-commit-config.yaml with commit-stage execution. 4) Run relevant checks to confirm the hook script executes cleanly. 5) Store this request and plan in a prompts fixture for commit validation.

context.notes: Adds a commit-stage hook that runs pytest for critical and regression markers.
